task_completion.description: Verify that an Autopsy case was created with the specified name and case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy application window showing the case name 'Steganography_Triage_2024' and case number 'INV-STEG-001' in the case details, dashboard, or title bar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image was loaded into the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'jpeg_search.dd' listed under the 'Data Sources' tree in the Autopsy UI.

task_completion.description: Verify that JPEG files were extracted to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal output showing JPEG files located inside the '/home/ga/Reports/extracted_jpegs/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and correct formatting of the CSV analysis report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/steg_analysis.csv'. It must contain the exact header 'FILENAME|FILE_SIZE|LAST_EOI_OFFSET|EXTRANEOUS_BYTES' followed by pipe-delimited data rows.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the summary text report with the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/steg_summary.txt'. It must show the total number of JPEGs analyzed, the count of JPEGs with appended data, and a list of suspicious filenames.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to create the case.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the Autopsy application interface is visible in the screenshots, rather than the agent just creating a folder named 'Steganography_Triage_2024' via the terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the reports contain actual calculated data rather than placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the contents of the CSV and summary reports. The file sizes, offsets, and extraneous byte counts should be realistic numbers, not placeholder text like '<size>' or copied directly from the prompt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent extracted real files from the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the extracted JPEGs have realistic filenames and sizes derived from the .dd image, rather than the agent creating dummy empty .jpg files using the 'touch' command.
